query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets) as assets_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sites) as sites_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workOrders) as workorders_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auditLogs) as auditlogs_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emailNotifications) as emails_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications) as notifications_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventoryItems) as inventory_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financialTransactions) as financial_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complianceRecords) as compliance_count;
